english: He who wears white garments, all-pervading Vishnu, moon-complexioned, four-armed
roman: Shuklambara dharam Vishnum shashi varnam chaturbhujam

english: With a serene face to be meditated upon for the removal of all obstacles
He whose attendants beginning with Ganesha number more than a hundred
roman: Yasya dwirada vaktryadyah paarishadyah parah shatam

english: Who constantly remove obstacles — I take refuge in that Vishwaksena (Vishnu)
Vyasa, grandson of Vasishtha, grandson of Shakti, the pure one
I bow to the son of Parashara, father of Shuka, treasure of austerity
The universe, Vishnu, the Vashat-kara, Lord of past present and future
roman: Vishvam Vishnur Vashat karo bhuta bhavya bhavat prabhuh

english: Creator of beings, sustainer of beings, the being itself, soul of beings, origin of beings

hindi: पूतात्मा परमात्मा च मुक्तानां परमा गतिः।
english: The pure soul, the Supreme Soul, the highest goal of those who are liberated
roman: Pootatma Paramatma cha muktanam parama gatih

hindi: अव्ययः पुरुषः साक्षी क्षेत्रज्ञोऽक्षर एव च।
english: The inexhaustible, the Purusha, the witness, the knower of the field, the imperishable
roman: Avyayah purushah sakshi kshetragnah akshara eva cha

hindi: कायेन वाचा मनसेन्द्रियैर्वा, बुद्ध्यात्मना वा प्रकृतेस्स्वभावात्।
english: Whatever is done by body, speech, mind, senses, intellect, self or natural instinct
roman: Kayena vacha manase ndriyairva buddhyatmana va prakriteh svabhavat

english: Whatever I do, I offer it all to the Supreme, to Narayana
roman: Karomi yad yat sakalam parasmai Narayanayeti samarpayami
